Verified by reading setup_task.sh which explicitly launches ydbgui.
Verified by reading verifier.py which hardcodes score additions matching these exact weights.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires inspecting the VistA ^XUSEC global using YDBGui to identify holders of the XUPROG security key. The target data is synthetically generated by setup_task.sh, which explicitly injects user DUZs 1 and 42 into ^XUSEC(
). The verifier evaluates if these explicitly seeded key holders are correctly navigated to and visible via a VLM on the YDBGui interface.
